name: Carnitine
best_timing: 建议随餐服用或遵医嘱

raw_content.intake: Healthy people’s bodies can make all the carnitine they need. Therefore, carnitine is not anessentialnutrient, and experts haven’t set a recommended daily amount.
raw_content.risks: Carnitine in foods and beverages is safe. Therefore, carnitine doesn’t have anupper limit. However, taking 3gramsor more a day of carnitine as a dietary supplement can causenausea, vomiting, stomach cramps,diarrhea, and a fishy body odor. High amounts can also cause muscle weakness in people withchronickidney disease and can increase the risk ofseizuresin people who have a seizure disorder.
